name: Memory Stack — Weekly Maintenance + Temporal Sync
description: Weekly read-only maintenance pass (temporal sync -> verify -> auto-extract report -> audit -> capacity) that ALSO records hot-memory DRIFT into the temporal layer (--apply-temporal-sync: appends events to history.jsonl + memory_versions.db ONLY; NEVER modifies MEMORY.md/USER.md). Saturday 5 AM, distinct from the Sunday 4 AM LLM consolidation. Script-only, no provider calls, no gateway/Telegram interference. Exit 0 on success.
